MyKHAS

Türkçe

Directed by Ulaş Tosun, a photographer from our university, co-directed by M. Kaan Karataş, a student of the Department of Radio, Television and Cinema, and co-directed by Yağmur Ulutaş from the same department, the documentary “Hello Canım” won the Best Documentary award at the 22nd International Golden Saffron Documentary Competition.

Taking its title from the poem of the same name by Arkadaş Z. Özger, which caused controversy at the time it was written, the production team of the documentary also includes Baran Efe Öztürk, Melih Kaymaz and Barış Demirdelen, students and recent graduates of Kadir Has University Faculty of Communication, Department of Radio, Television and Cinema, and Tibet Akhuy, a student of the Department of New Media.

We congratulate our photographer, students and graduates for their success.

https://www.merhabacanim.com/
